title: Reloaded
description: an ultrakill inspired weapon pack focused on adding guns and movement focused weaponry
body:
just an ultrakill styled movement tech demo
now intended for survival use


Adds a new weapon called the XC-20 Shotbow, its cheap and unbalanced.
This datapack is heavily inspired by ultrakill.
The XC-20 Shotbow shoots 7 flaming bullets that ignite anythign they hit, pressing [SNEAK] whilst in the air allows you to double jump, shooting the shotbow hits you with a decent amount of recoil that sends you flying backwards, but is stronger horizontally than vertically. It is quite cheap.

Also adds the firework launcher, a bow that shoots fireworks!

new freezethrower, which is like a flame thrower but it slows youre enemies and doesnt burn them

Also adds the Impulse Sabre, a sword with two abilities, press W+A+SPRINT to do a zig zag dash, damaging everyone in your path, and W+SPRINT+JUMP to summon an orb that pulls all entites in, including you, allowign you to launch foward.

comes with full vfx and sfx design :3

You are welcome to use this in servers and modpacks as long as you give credit.
